reviews.review_title: Great app (give it time to install)
reviews.review_description: It's a great experience. Just give it about 5 minutes during the installing phase to load into the Oculus Go because it's quite big.

This is a great space educational app and very immersive. The Graphics up close wished were not quite so blurry.

Also gets choppy in parts and framerates dropped to as low as 8fps the odd time and that's on the s9.

Most of the time about 45-60fps, but close up events will tax your phone and would need a flagship very fast phone to run this app.
When I click it in my "uninstalled" tap it won't download. Others I click work ans and download+install

Still waiting for the coming soon , since 2 months ago ..
this is the 6th month and still no updates .... please guys go it as rift where its complete .... i hope this will not take forever to be updates...

reviews.review_title: Please port this to the quest 2?
reviews.review_description: I absolutely loved this game, when I played it on the Oculus Go. I am saddened to find out, that i can't play it on my new oculus quest 2. I am also disappointed, because I paid money for this app, and this is making me more reluctant to buy other apps, out of fear that they will not be playable in newer devices.  Please make this app available on the quest 2.

I highly recommend this app. The only criticism that I have (and it’s minor) is that the fog from my breath (supposedly) covers up my view. But I understand that it enhances the illusion of virtual reality, so it’s not a big deal.
LOVE IT!!...Please add the other planets. Thanx!
The content gets better with time.  I more than like this trek

so far I've done only one tour but I was very impressed by this immersive educational tour. with a little imagination I can see my grandchildren doing one of these tours in real life. great experience!

Excellent immersion and quality on Occulus Go. I am usually not writing reviews but can the developers tell us when we can expect Saturn as it is on coming soon since months... that is why 4 stars only as content is sold but still not available in full...

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Space Tours Around
reviews.review_description:
Everything about this app is awesome and I'm not in to space but this has got me in to space. the 3D is good looks nice runs 100% (on a Galaxy S10+) I don't want to say to much about it for the ones that are thinking about getting it. Give it a go if your in to Space Tours this is one of the best one out there.

My Youtube channel all the Oculus GO/Gear VR apps I have played.
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCD_2bgeRPwyW65XEsM0RKlA
Please, please do the Saturn update
